testcase.name: contextLoads
testcase.system-out:
20:02:10.663 [main] INFO o.s.t.c.s.AnnotationConfigContextLoaderUtils - Could not detect default configuration classes for test class [com.cognizant.springlearn.SpringLearnApplicationTests]: SpringLearnApplicationTests does not declare any static, non-private, non-final, nested classes annotated with @Configuration. 20:02:10.806 [main] INFO o.s.b.t.c.SpringBootTestContextBootstrapper - Found @SpringBootConfiguration com.cognizant.springlearn.SpringLearnApplication for test class com.cognizant.springlearn.SpringLearnApplicationTests 20:02:10.970 [main] INFO o.s.t.c.s.AnnotationConfigContextLoaderUtils - Could not detect default configuration classes for test class [com.cognizant.springlearn.SpringLearnApplicationTests]: SpringLearnApplicationTests does not declare any static, non-private, non-final, nested classes annotated with @Configuration. 20:02:10.972 [main] INFO o.s.b.t.c.SpringBootTestContextBootstrapper - Found @SpringBootConfiguration com.cognizant.springlearn.SpringLearnApplication for test class com.cognizant.springlearn.SpringLearnApplicationTests 20:02:11.061 [main] INFO o.s.b.d.r.RestartApplicationListener - Restart disabled due to context in which it is running
